Mean PFS 4.630 mo on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=7585) vs 4.704 mo off (n=42415); diff=-0.074, Welch t-test p=0.0175.

Among er_positive=1 patients, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months.
Among her2_positive=0 patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among low-NLR patients (lowest tertile), treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

Among patients with low albumin_g_dl (lowest quartile), treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is null or negative.
Among patients with high albumin_g_dl (highest quartile), treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pembro in low NLR tertile
ttest pembro in high NLR tertile
ttest pembro in low albumin Q1
ttest pembro in high albumin Q4

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among BRCA1=1 OR BRCA2=1 patients, treatment_olaparib remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment for age, ECOG, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, and tumor_size_cm.
Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment.
Among her2_positive=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment.
Among ER+/HER2- patients, treatment_palbociclib remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment.
Among ER+ patients, treatment_tamoxifen remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment.
Among her2_low=1, her2_positive=0 patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ olaparib + covariates in BRCA+
analyses.result_summary: n=2499 BRCA carriers; adjusted olaparib coef=+0.081 mo, p=0.366.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ pembro + covariates in MSI-high
analyses.result_summary: n=498 MSI-high; adjusted pembro coef=+0.144 mo, p=0.341.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ trastuzumab + covariates in HER2+
analyses.result_summary: n=9060 HER2+; adjusted trastuzumab coef=+0.006 mo, p=0.59.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ palbo + covariates in HR+/HER2-
analyses.result_summary: n=28589 HR+/HER2-; adjusted palbo coef=+1.923 mo, p=0.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ tamoxifen + covariates in ER+
analyses.result_summary: n=34886 ER+; adjusted tamoxifen coef=+0.003 mo, p=0.879.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ saci + covariates in HER2-low
analyses.result_summary: n=18543 HER2-low; adjusted saci coef=+0.047 mo, p=0.208.
